# Buyer State Diagnostics

The agent must identify buyer state before choosing methods.

| State | Buyer thought | Best tactic |
|---|---|---|
| Unaware | I do not know I have this problem. | Hidden-cost reveal, market shift, founder POV. |
| Problem-aware | This hurts. | Pain articulation, diagnostic, calculator. |
| Solution-aware | I know tools exist. | Category explainer, mechanism demo. |
| Vendor-aware | I am comparing vendors. | Comparison, reviews, proof, pricing clarity. |
| Decision-ready | I need to reduce risk. | Trial, pilot, security, implementation proof. |
| Post-click skeptical | This could be BS. | Show demo, docs, examples, limitations. |
| Trial user | I need first value. | Activation prompts, templates, sample data. |
| Paid customer | I need continued value. | Onboarding, expansion, retention proof. |

## Diagnostic questions

```text
What does the buyer already believe?
What are they currently doing instead?
What would trigger them to look?
What would make them skeptical?
What proof would they inspect?
What risk blocks them?
What next step is too large?
```

## Rule

A mismatch between buyer state and tactic is enough to kill conversion even when the product is good.
